text: Hello and welcome to Real Easy English.
zh: 大家好，欢迎收听Real Easy English。

text: In this podcast we have real conversations in easy English to help you learn. I'm Neil. And I'm Beth.
zh: 在这个播客节目中，我们用简单的英语进行真实的对话，帮助大家学习。我是Neil。我是Beth。

text: Did you know you can watch a video of this podcast on our website? Go to bbclearningenglish .com
zh: 你知道吗，你可以在我们的网站上观看这个播客的视频。请访问bbclearningenglish.com。

text: Hi Beth, how are you today? I'm very good, thank you. Neil, how are you? I'm very good. What are we talking about?
zh: 嗨，Beth，你今天怎么样？我很好，谢谢。Neil，你呢？我也很好。我们今天聊什么呢？

text: Well, today we are talking about waste. So that's what we call things that we don't want anymore,
zh: 嗯，今天我们要聊聊“垂废物”（waste）。这是我们用来指那些我们不再需要的东西的说法，

text: like rubbish or things that we've used and we now don't need them.
zh: 比如垃圾，或者我们用过之后不再需要的东西。

text: So, for example, after I've eaten some crisps as a snack,
zh: 举个例子，比如我吃完薄脆片作为零食后，

text: the packet is rubbish, it's waste.
zh: 那个包装袋就是垃圾，就是废物。

text: Are you good at dealing with waste? I think so. I mean, at home we recycle.
zh: 你在处理垃圾方面做得好吗？我觉得还不错。我们家会做垂类回收。

text: We can recycle glass, plastic, metal, card,
zh: 我们可以回收玻璃、塑料、金属、纸板，

text: all the usual things that we recycle here in the UK.
zh: 也就是英国这里通常会回收的那些东西。

text: What about you? Yeah, I do what I'm supposed to do.
zh: 你呢？嗯，我也按规定去做。

text: So we have a separate bin for different things, for plastic and for glass and for paper and for food.
zh: 我们家有分开的垂圾桶，分别放塑料、玻璃、纸和食物垂废。

text: Yeah. When I was a kid, everything went in the same bin.
zh: 是啊。我小时候，所有东西都扔进同一个垂圾桶。

text: Really? Yeah. And now that seems really crazy and really bad.
zh: 真的吗？是啊。现在想想那真的挺离谱、挺不好的。

text: Yeah. So I think we are better now at dealing with waste,
zh: 是啊，我觉得我们现在在处理垂废方面做得更好了，

text: but probably there's more things we can do. Yeah, I would think so. Yeah.
zh: 但可能还有更多可以改进的地方。是啊，我也这么想。

text: Something that I do as well is when I'm in a supermarket, I try to not buy fruit and veg that's wrapped in
zh: 我自己还会做的一件事是，在超市买水果和蔬菜时，我会尽量不买用

text: plastic. I'll always try and buy the individual products
zh: 塑料包装的。我总是尽量买单个的产品，

text: like apples on their own or, you know, a courgette.
zh: 比如单独的苹果，或者，你知道，一根西葫芦。

text: You don't need a courgette that's wrapped in plastic. Well, that's a good idea. But sometimes it's actually quite difficult
zh: 你根本不需要用塑料包着的西葫芦。哦，这是个好主意。但有时候确实很难

text: to find things that that aren't covered in plastic, because we rely on plastic so much.
zh: 找到没有用塑料包装的东西，因为我们太依赖塑料了。

text: Yeah, I know that is true. You know what people do these days, which is great that they didn't used to do?
zh: 是啊，这倒是真的。你知道现在人们有个习惯，以前没有，但现在挺好的吗？

text: Carry reusable water bottles. That's true. Almost everybody carries a bottle.
zh: 随身携带可重复使用的水瓶。没错，几乎每个人都带着水瓶。

text: And just a few years ago, people bought plastic bottles of water all the time.
zh: 而就在几年前，人们经常买塑料瓶装水。

text: Yeah, I remember when I was teaching in a classroom and I'd sometimes have students,
zh: 是啊，我记得我在教室教书的时候，有时候会有学生，

text: they would come to London from all over the world, and every day they would go to a supermarket and buy a plastic bottle.
zh: 他们从世界各地来到伦敦，每天都会去超市买一瓶塑料瓶装水。

text: And I used to say sometimes, you know, buy a reusable one, and
zh: 我有时会跟他们说，你知道，买个可重复使用的水瓶吧，

text: then you're not using this plastic all the time. Yeah, we have a word for that, don't we?
zh: 这样你就不用一直用塑料瓶了。是啊，我们对这个有个专门的说法，对吧？

text: Single -use plastic. Yeah, so we have to try and avoid single -use plastics.
zh: 一次性塑料。是啊，所以我们得尽量避免使用一次性塑料。

text: What about water? So water waste. I really like having a bath just to relax,
zh: 那水呢？水资源浪费。我很喜欢泡澎放松一下，

text: but sometimes I feel really guilty about it because it's using up quite a lot of water.
zh: 但有时候我会觉得挺有负罪感的，因为这会用掉不少水。

text: Yeah, I prefer showers, which is good because they use less water.
zh: 是啊，我更喜欢冲澎，这样挺好的，因为用水更少。

text: So, Beth, is there anything that you are planning to do to cut down further on the waste that you create?
zh: 那Beth，你有没有打算做些什么，进一步减少你产生的垂废呢？

text: I should probably have fewer baths. I mean, I maybe have one a week.
zh: 我大概应该少泡几次澎。我一般一周泡一次。

text: So, I mean, I shower too, of course. But maybe I could
zh: 我当然也会冲澎。但也许我可以

text: have a bath less often, find other ways of relaxing which are less wasteful.
zh: 少泡澎一些，找其他更省水的放松方式。

text: What about you? Anything you want to cut back on? Yeah, I think we talked about single use plastic.
zh: 你呢？有什么打算减少的吗？是啊，我们刚才提到了一次性塑料。

text: You know, cling film, a very thin, like sheet, sheets of plastic that you wrap food in.
zh: 比如保鲜膜，那种很薄的塑料薄膜，用来包食物的。

text: Yeah. I always feel bad when I use that stuff. But it's also really convenient and does its job
zh: 是啊。我用那种东西的时候总觉得挺过意不去的。但它确实很方便，也很好用，

text: well, keeping a sandwich together. But I don't like it.
zh: 比如把三明治包得整整齐齐。但我不太喜欢它。

text: So I want to cut down down on my use of cling film.
zh: 所以我想减少使用保鲜膜。

text: Let's recap the vocabulary we heard in this conversation.
zh: 让我们回顾一下这次对话中出现的词汇。

text: We had Waste is things that are unwanted, like rubbish.
zh: 我们讲到waste（废物），指的是不再需要的东西，比如垂圾。

text: We can also describe something as a waste, when someone uses something they don't need to,
zh: 我们也可以说某事是a waste（一种浪费），指有人用了不必要用的东西，

text: or they throw something away after not using it.
zh: 或者用都没用就把东西丢掉了。

text: So, for example, when my kids don't finish their dinner, that's a waste.
zh: 比如说，我的孩子没吃完晚饭，那就是一种浪费。

text: We heard single -use plastics. These are plastic materials that we use once and then throw away.
zh: 我们听到了single-use plastics（一次性塑料）。这是指我们用一次就丢掉的塑料制品。

text: So, for example, food wrappers and shopping bags.
zh: 比如食品包装纸和购物袋。

text: We heard recycle, which means to collect rubbish in order to make materials that can be used again.
zh: 我们听到了recycle（回收），意思是收集垂圾，以便重新制成可以再利用的材料。

text: We can also describe something as recyclable.
zh: 我们也可以说某物是recyclable（可回收的）。

text: It means it can be recycled, it can be used again.
zh: 意思是它可以被回收，可以再次被利用。

text: And we had some common phrasal verbs that we use when talking about the environment.
zh: 我们还学到了一些谈论环境话题时常用的动词短语。

text: So we had rely on, which means need something in order to function.
zh: 比如rely on（依赖），意思是需要某物才能正常运作。

text: For example, we rely on plastic a lot in our daily lives.
zh: 例如，我们日常生活中非常依赖塑料。

text: We can also say cut down on, which means to reduce something.
zh: 我们也可以说cut down on，意思是减少某事物。

text: And we also hear cut back on. So, for example, I want to cut back on single -use plastic.
zh: 我们还听到了cut back on。比如说，我想减少一次性塑料的使用。

text: That's it for this episode of Real Easy English.
zh: 这就是本期Real Easy English的全部内容。

text: If you want to learn more phrasal verbs about the environment, then Georgie has made a whole video on
zh: 如果你想学习更多关于环境话题的动词短语，Georgie做了一整个视频来讲

text: this. You'll find the link in the notes below. See you then. Bye!
zh: 这个内容。你可以在下面的说明里找到链接。下次再见，拜拜！
